resume_context.next_objective: Follow the implementation plan in .symphony/progress/CLZ-49.md. Read it first, then implement each step.
resume_context.last_turn_summary:
Implemented structured turn lifecycle logging in [delivery_engine.ex](/tmp/symphony-claude-runner/workspaces/CLZ-49/elixir/lib/symphony_elixir/delivery_engine.ex). `plan` and `implement` now run through a shared timed wrapper around `provider.run_turn/4`, normalize provider/model/issue/tokens, and emit a consistent `delivery_engine.agent_turn` event with `stage`, `provider`, `model`, `issue`, `duration_ms`, `tokens`, and a stage-specific `result`. The plan skip path is logged too, and the implement path logs against the fetched `TurnResult` before downstream stage routing.

Added a `capture_log` regression in [delivery_engine_phase6_test.exs](/tmp/symphony-claude-runner/workspaces/CLZ-49/elixir/test/symphony_elixir/delivery_engine_phase6_test.exs) plus a targeted fake Codex turn script so one run exercises `plan -> implement` and asserts the lifecycle payload. I also updated [CLZ-49 progress](/tmp/symphony-claude-runner/workspaces/CLZ-49/.symphony/progress/CLZ-49.md), [runtime-core feature](/tmp/symphony-claude-runner/workspaces/CLZ-49/.symphony/features/runtime-core.yaml), and [deploy feature](/tmp/symphony-claude-runner/workspaces/CLZ-49/.symphony/features/deploy.yaml).

Verification: `mix test test/symphony_elixir/delivery_engine_phase6_test.exs:213 --trace --max-failures 1` passed. A broader `mix test test/symphony_elixir/delivery_engine_phase6_test.exs` run stalled later in the existing `scoped review-fix retries count implementation turns from the retry window base` path, so I’m not claiming the whole file is green from this turn.

`files_touched`:
- `elixir/lib/symphony_elixir/delivery_engine.ex`
- `elixir/test/symphony_elixir/delivery_engine_phase6_test.exs`
- `.symphony/progress/CLZ-49.md`
- `.symphony/features/runtime-core.yaml`
- `.symphony/features/deploy.yaml`

`blocked=false`
`needs_another_turn=false`
